name: Beginner Issue
about: Small tasks for new contributors.
title: "[BEGINNER] <Task description>"
labels: good-first-issue, beginner
assignees: ''

---

## Task Description
A simple, well-defined task for someone new to the project.

## Relevant Files
List the files that need to be modified.

## Expected Outcome
What should the result look like?

## Suggested Approach
Briefly explain how a beginner should tackle this.

## Resources
Links to documentation or examples within the codebase that might be helpful.
